    Board.clearRows()
    Checks the board for completed rows, removes them, shifts the remaining rows down, calculates the score bonus, and returns the results.
    ClearRow
    SimpleBoard.clearRows()
    Checks the board for completed rows, removes them, shifts the remaining rows down, calculates the score bonus, updates the internal board matrix, and awards the score.
